title: ficaria verna f. dolichopetala
intro: Ficaria verna f. dolichopetala, also known as the lesser celandine, is a perennial plant with heart-shaped leaves and bright yellow flowers that bloom in early spring. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ficaria verna f. dolichopetala include reducing swelling and pain, as well as fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat minor cuts, scrapes, and burns.
